properties.text: bid() reentrancy guard must prevent re-entry via attacker-controlled callback execution.
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset, amount, data): s_entered == true during callback => re-entry to bid() reverts ReentrantCall()

properties.text: s_entered reentrancy flag shared between bid() and isValidSignature() must block cross-function re-entry.
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset,amt,data): s_entered==true => isValidSignature(hash,sig) reverts ReentrantCall()

properties.text: bid() transfers asset to bidder BEFORE pulling assetOut, enabling flash-loan bids via callback.
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset,amt,data): safeTransfer(bidder,amt) precedes safeTransferFrom(bidder,this,assetOutAmt)

properties.text: bid() callback executes attacker-controlled code with transferred assets before assetOut is pulled.
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset,amt,data): data.length>0 => callback(bidder,assetOut,assetOutAmt,data) called after transfer

properties.text: bid() must reject bids where bidUsdValue is below minBidUsdValue threshold.
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset,amount,data): bidUsdValue(amount) >= minBidUsdValue => proceed; else revert BidValueTooLow

properties.text: bid() must reject bids where amount exceeds contract's current balance of the auctioned asset.
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset,amount,data): amount <= balanceOf(this) => proceed; else revert BidAmountTooHigh

properties.text: Auction price must decay monotonically from startingPriceMultiplier to endingPriceMultiplier over duration.
properties.assertion: forall t1<t2<=auctionDuration: getAssetOutAmount(t1,amt) <= getAssetOutAmount(t2,amt)

properties.text: bid() must revert if no active auction exists for the asset (auctionStart == 0 or expired).
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset,amt,data): s_auctionStarts[asset]!=0 AND elapsed<=duration => proceed; else revert

properties.text: isValidSignature must validate GPv2Order hash matches recomputed hash from decoded order data.
properties.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash,sig): hash == GPv2Order.hash(decode(sig),domainSep) => proceed; else revert

properties.text: isValidSignature must enforce buyToken == s_assetOut to prevent solver specifying arbitrary output token.
properties.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash,sig): order.buyToken == s_assetOut; else revert InvalidBuyToken

properties.text: isValidSignature must enforce receiver == address(this) to prevent diverting bought tokens.
properties.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash,sig): order.receiver == address(this); else revert InvalidReceiver

properties.text: isValidSignature must enforce buyAmount >= minBuyAmount from price curve to prevent underpaying solver.
properties.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash,sig): order.buyAmount >= _getAssetOutAmount(params,price,sellAmt,elapsed,true)

properties.text: isValidSignature must reject orders with sellAmount == 0 to prevent zero-value settlements.
properties.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash,sig): order.sellAmount > 0; else revert InvalidZeroAmount

properties.text: isValidSignature must reject orders with sellAmount exceeding contract balance.
properties.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash,sig): order.sellAmount <= balanceOf(this); else revert InsufficientBalance

properties.text: isValidSignature must reject expired orders where validTo < block.timestamp.
properties.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash,sig): order.validTo >= block.timestamp; else revert ExpiredOrder

properties.text: isValidSignature must enforce feeAmount == 0, kind == KIND_SELL, partiallyFillable == true.
properties.assertion: forall isValidSignature: order.feeAmount==0 AND order.kind==SELL AND order.partiallyFillable==true

properties.text: isValidSignature must enforce both sellTokenBalance and buyTokenBalance are BALANCE_ERC20.
properties.assertion: forall isValidSignature: order.sellTokenBalance==ERC20 AND order.buyTokenBalance==ERC20; else revert

properties.text: Vault relayer approval must equal full contract balance on auction start and be revoked to zero on end.
properties.assertion: forall _onAuctionStart: approve(relayer,balanceOf(this)); forall _onAuctionEnd: approve(relayer,0)

properties.text: Vault relayer approval during live auction must not exceed auctioned asset balance at approval time.
properties.assertion: forall _onAuctionStart(asset): approval(relayer) == balanceOf(this,asset) at time of call

properties.text: Remaining vault relayer approval after partial bids may exceed remaining balance, enabling solver overdraft.
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset,amt): approval(relayer) set at start >= balance_after_bid => solver can pull excess via approval

properties.text: performUpkeep must revert if auction already live for an asset (prevent double-start).
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep(eligible): s_auctionStarts[asset]!=0 => revert LiveAuction()

properties.text: checkUpkeep iterates all allowlisted assets; unbounded asset count may exceed block gas limit.
properties.assertion: forall checkUpkeep(): gas_consumed(loop) < block.gasLimit for all possible s_allowlistedAssets sizes

properties.text: No new auctions start when assetOut price feed is invalid (isAssetOutPriceValid == false).
properties.assertion: forall checkUpkeep(): !isAssetOutPriceValid => eligibleAssetsIdx = 0 (no new auctions returned)

properties.text: Ended auctions can still be processed even when assetOut price feed is invalid.
properties.assertion: forall checkUpkeep(): !isAssetOutPriceValid => endedAuctions list unaffected by price validity

properties.text: performUpkeep must reject assets with usdValue below minAuctionSizeUsd to prevent dust auctions.
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep(eligible): usdValue(asset) >= minAuctionSizeUsd; else revert AmountBelowMinAuctionSize

properties.text: WorkflowRouter onReport assumes only FORWARDER_ROLE callers; forwarder is trusted per scope.
properties.assertion: forall onReport(metadata,report): msg.sender has FORWARDER_ROLE (enforced by onlyRole modifier)

properties.text: onReport must enforce workflowId non-zero AND allowlisted before decoding report payload.
properties.assertion: forall onReport(meta,report): workflowId!=bytes32(0) AND s_allowlisted.contains(workflowId) => decode

properties.text: onReport target+selector allowlist check must reject non-allowlisted target or selector combinations.
properties.assertion: forall onReport: !selectors[target].has(sel) AND !targets.has(target) => revert TargetNotAllowlisted

properties.text: _call forwards all remaining gas via low-level call; revert data is bubbled up from target.
properties.assertion: forall _call(target,data): !success AND response.length>0 => revert(response); response.length==0 => LowLevelFail

properties.text: Removing a workflowId must cascade-remove all associated targets and selectors before removing the ID.
properties.assertion: forall remove(wfId): _applyTargetsUpdates(wfId,all,empty) before s_allowlistedWorkflowIds.remove(wfId)

properties.text: GPV2CompatibleAuction assumes gpV2VaultRelayer and gpV2Settlement are non-zero immutable addresses.
properties.assertion: constructor: gpV2VaultRelayer!=address(0) AND gpV2Settlement!=address(0); both immutable post-deploy

properties.text: Only ORDER_MANAGER_ROLE can invalidate CowSwap orders; invalidated orders fail isValidSignature hash check.
properties.assertion: forall invalidateOrders(uids): msg.sender has ORDER_MANAGER_ROLE; post: settlement.invalidated(uid)==true

properties.text: After _onAuctionEnd, vault relayer approval must be exactly zero and remaining assets transferred out.
properties.assertion: forall _onAuctionEnd(asset): post: allowance(relayer)==0 AND balance(asset)==0 (transferred to receiver)

properties.text: After performUpkeep starts auction, s_auctionStarts[asset] must equal block.timestamp exactly.
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep(eligible): post: s_auctionStarts[asset] == block.timestamp for each started asset

properties.text: After bid() completes, s_entered must be reset to false regardless of callback success or failure.
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset,amt,data): post: s_entered == false (reset in all execution paths)

properties.text: isValidSignature must reject orders for assets without active auctions (auctionStart == 0).
properties.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash,sig): s_auctionStarts[sellToken]==0 => revert InvalidAuction(sellToken)

properties.text: isValidSignature must reject orders where auction has expired (elapsedTime > auctionDuration).
properties.assertion: forall isValidSignature: block.timestamp - auctionStart > auctionDuration => revert InvalidAuction

properties.text: Selector removal in WorkflowRouter is strict: removing non-existent selector reverts SelectorNotAllowlisted.
properties.assertion: forall _applySelectorsUpdates(remove): !selectors.remove(sel) => revert SelectorNotAllowlisted

properties.text: Selector addition in WorkflowRouter is idempotent: adding duplicate is silent no-op, no revert.
properties.assertion: forall _applySelectorsUpdates(add): selectors.add(sel) returns false => no event, continue

properties.text: Assembly cast from bytes32[] to bytes4[] in _applyAllowlistedTargetsUpdates must preserve selector values.
properties.assertion: forall _applyTargetsUpdates(remove): cast(bytes32[]) to bytes4[] preserves first 4 bytes of each element
